entry.title: New: RES24-168 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES VALUED AT $1,050.43 TO THE CITY FROM THE WESTERN CHAPTER INTERNATIONAL SOCIETY OF ARBORICULTURE (WCISA) FOR A STAFF MEMBER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF PARKS AND RECREATION’S DIVISION OF URBAN FORESTRY TO ATTEND THE WCISA BOARD MEETING IN SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA, JULY 18-19, 2024.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
